_comment: Reference baseline from official rez benchmarks (https://github.com/AcademySoftwareFoundation/rez/metrics/benchmarking/RESULTS.md)
_methodology: Measured on Linux, Python 3.9, 2-core Azure Xeon E5-2673 v4 @ 2.30GHz. Times are median of 50 solve requests.

rex_execute_10cmds.note: 10-command Rex block execution in Python rez

shell_script_generate.note: Generate bash activation script in Python rez

package_py_parse.note: Parse a 50-line package.py in Python rez

startup_import.note: import rez (cold start) in Python rez
